summary: Iteration 61: Verified Bayesian Engine v2 implementation. All 17 pytest unit tests passed. Additional math verification confirmed: (1) Covariate weight NEVER exceeds 25%, (2) Prior + Momentum always >= 74%, (3) Streak detection (OVER_N/UNDER_N) working, (4) Volatility scoring (LOW/NORMAL/HIGH/EXTREME) working, (5) Exponential decay momentum weighting applied correctly, (6) Edge cases (empty logs, single game, zero variance) handled. Frontend loads without console errors. Health endpoint returns ok.

success_rate.backend: 100% (17/17 pytest tests passed + 6 additional verification tests)

seed_data_creation: None - used synthetic test data in unit tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 verified Bayesian Engine v2 implementation. Key features tested: (1) Covariate layer hard-capped at 25% max weight via MAX_COVARIATE_RATIO=0.33, (2) Prior precision floor using n^0.6 ensures high-variance players still carry meaningful weight, (3) Exponential decay weights [1.0, 0.82, 0.67, 0.55, 0.45] for momentum layer, (4) New fields: streakFlag (OVER_N/UNDER_N/NONE), volatility (LOW/NORMAL/HIGH/EXTREME), cv (coefficient of variation). Integration points: predict.py lines 2060-2087 and basketball_predict.py lines 969-982 both call compute_bayesian_projection. The Bayesian Engine section in ProjectionCard.jsx only renders when bayesianMetrics.priorSamples > 0 (requires real prediction data).

bayesian_engine_v2.prior_momentum_dominance: Prior + Momentum always >= 74% of total weight
bayesian_engine_v2.streak_detection: OVER_N and UNDER_N patterns detected from recent games vs line
bayesian_engine_v2.edge_cases: Empty logs, single game, zero variance all handled correctly

frontend.projection_card: Bayesian Engine section renders when priorSamples > 0
frontend.layer_weight_bars: Season, Momentum, Context with percentage display
